acceptance_criteria:
- All baml-* and internal-baml-* crates live under crates/ with matching folder names
- No nested baml-bridge/Cargo.toml workspace remains
- Root workspace paths point to new crate locations and cargo check passes
description: Move baml-bridge subcrates into root crates/ with folder names matching crate names, remove nested workspace artifacts, and update internal path dependencies/workspace paths to the new layout.
title: Fold baml-bridge crates into root workspace layout
